'''Ripter''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served under [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Huba]] in the [[Indobok Pirates]]. Formerly a cook along with the rest of the gang, he was forced to work in a crystal mine after [[Olag Greck]] framed the chefs for an attempted poisoning of [[Boonda/Legends|Boonda]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]. After escaping the mine, he helped steal the ''[[Tharen Wayfarer]]'' from the [[Pitareeze family]]. During the capture, the [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] also took the [[Droid/Legends|droids]] [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]]. When the duo tried to escape from the pirates, Ripter challenged C-3PO to a [[vump-shugga]] race. While Ripter reached the [[Captain's pendant]] first, C-3PO managed to snatch it from his hand, sending Ripter and his [[Swoop/Legends|swoop]] straight in to a group of [[Vynock/Legends|vynocks]]. Ripter survived the resulting crash and made his way back to the pirates' camp just in time to scare Olag Greck and his henchman, [[Xob]], away.
